---
title: "Arrows in PDF"
format: pdf
filters:
  - arrow
---

## Basic Arrows

Straight line arrow:

{{< arrow from="50,30" to="250,30" >}}

## Curved Arrows

Quadratic Bezier curve:

{{< arrow from="50,50" to="250,50" control1="150,0" >}}

Cubic Bezier S-curve:

{{< arrow from="50,30" to="250,100" control1="100,0" control2="200,130" >}}

## Styled Arrows

Red arrow:

{{< arrow from="50,30" to="250,30" color="red" >}}

Thick blue arrow:

{{< arrow from="50,30" to="250,30" color="blue" width="4" >}}

Dashed arrow:

{{< arrow from="50,30" to="250,30" dash="5,3" >}}

## Notes

PDF support renders static SVG arrows. Dynamic features like percentage-based coordinates are not available in PDF output.
